title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at PropTiger

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at PropTiger
jsonLd.description:
PropTiger has an exciting opening for a Real Estate Agent at our Vijayawada office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About PropTiger:
PropTiger is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PropTiger!
